name: Darius

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Hemorrhage
passive.description_source: Innate:  Darius'  basic attacks and damaging  abilities apply a  stack of Hemorrhage, stacking up to a cap.

effects.description: Innate: Darius' damaging basic attacks and abilities apply a stack of Hemorrhage to enemies for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and stacking up to 5 times.

Hemorrhage: For each stack, the target is dealt[ 13 : 32 (based on level) (+ 30% bonus AD) total physical damage over the duration, ][ 3.25 : 8 (based on level) (+ 7.5% bonus AD) physical damage every 1.25 seconds over the duration, ]up to a maximum of[ 65 : 160 (based on level) (+ 150% bonus AD) total physical damage over the duration. ][ 16.25 : 40 (based on level) (+ 37.5% bonus AD) physical damage with each tick. ]Hemorrhage deals 200% damage against monsters.
When Darius kills a champion with Noxian Guillotine, or applies 5 stacks on an enemy champion, he becomes empowered with Noxian Might for 5 seconds.
Noxian Might: Darius gains 30 : 280 (based on level) bonus attack damage and instantly applies 5 Hemorrhage stacks through his usual means.

passive.description: Innate: Darius' damaging basic attacks and abilities apply a stack of Hemorrhage to enemies for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and stacking up to 5 times.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): If Hemorrhage's total post-mitigation damage is higher than the target's current health, a small area of sight is granted around the target for the duration of Hemorrhage and for another 2 seconds after it ends.

basic_ability_1.name: Decimate
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Darius briefly winds up to spin his axe in a circle while  ghosted, dealing physical damage to enemies hit.

effects.description: Physical Damage (Blade)
effects.context_notes: Active: Darius becomes ghosted for 1 second and hefts his axe for 0.75 seconds, afterward swinging it around himself to deal physical damage to nearby enemies. Enemies within the inner radius take 35% damage.

effects.description: Reduced Damage (Handle)
effects.context_notes: Active: Darius becomes ghosted for 1 second and hefts his axe for 0.75 seconds, afterward swinging it around himself to deal physical damage to nearby enemies. Enemies within the inner radius take 35% damage.

effects.description: Against champions and large monsters hit, Darius heals for 17% : 51% (based on number of targets hit by the outer radius) of his missing health. Enemies hit by the inner radius do not refresh the duration of or gain a stack of Hemorrhage.
Darius can move during Decimate, but is unable to declare basic attacks or cast Apprehend or Noxian Guillotine.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Darius becomes ghosted for 1 second and hefts his axe for 0.75 seconds, afterward swinging it around himself to deal physical damage to nearby enemies. Enemies within the inner radius take 35% damage.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Decimate will cancel if Darius enters stasis or uses Dash during the delay.

basic_ability_2.name: Crippling Strike
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Darius' next  basic attack within a few seconds deals increased physical damage and  slows the target.

effects.description: Bonus Physical Damage
effects.context_notes: Active: Darius empowers his next basic attack within 4 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 25 bonus range, deal bonus physical damage and slow the target by 90% for 1 second.

effects.description: If this attack kills the target, half of Crippling Strike's cooldown is reduced and its mana cost is refunded.
Crippling Strike resets Darius' basic attack timer.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Darius empowers his next basic attack within 4 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 25 bonus range, deal bonus physical damage and slow the target by 90% for 1 second. This damage is affected by critical strike modifiers.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Crippling Strike is a next-basic-attack empower with uncancellable empowered-hit windup and basic-attack-timer reset, so damage/slow resolve on the attack event rather than at cast time.

Source notes (summary): Damage is basic-damage-class while also triggering spell-effect hooks; source notes specify spell-shield does not block damage and kill-triggered cooldown/mana refunds have explicit target exclusions.

basic_ability_3.name: Apprehend

effects.description: Armor Penetration

Active: Darius sweeps his axe in a cone in the target direction, granting sight of the area for 1 second while pulling enemies hit towards him. Upon arrival, they rebound 150 units off of him, remaining airborne and becoming slowed by 40% for 1 second.
Darius is unable to move or cast Decimate or Noxian Guillotine for 0.4 seconds after Apprehend's cast time.

context_notes: Source notes (summary): Enemies hit by Apprehend will quickly be dragged to Darius before rebounding over a longer period.

ultimate.name: Noxian Guillotine
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Darius  leaps to an enemy champion and strikes a lethal blow, dealing true damage based on the target's current  Hemorrhage stacks.

effects.description: True Damage
effects.context_notes: Active: Darius attempts to execute the target enemy champion, leaping towards them to deal true damage, increased by 0% : 100% (based on target's Hemorrhage stacks), and granting sight of the area around them for 2.5 seconds from the start of the cast time.

effects.description: Bonus Damage Per Stack
effects.context_notes: Active: Darius attempts to execute the target enemy champion, leaping towards them to deal true damage, increased by 0% : 100% (based on target's Hemorrhage stacks), and granting sight of the area around them for 2.5 seconds from the start of the cast time.

effects.description: Maximum True Damage
effects.context_notes: Active: Darius attempts to execute the target enemy champion, leaping towards them to deal true damage, increased by 0% : 100% (based on target's Hemorrhage stacks), and granting sight of the area around them for 2.5 seconds from the start of the cast time.

effects.description: If the target dies within 0.15 seconds after being hit by Noxian Guillotine, Darius fears nearby minions and monsters for 3 seconds, during which they are gradually slowed by up to 99% over the duration. He can also recast the ability within 20 seconds at no cost, which refreshes on further successful executions.
At rank 3, Noxian Guillotine has no mana cost and recast timer.
Darius is unable to cast Decimate or Apprehend for 0.25 seconds after Noxian Guillotine's cast time.

ultimate.description: Active: Darius attempts to execute the target enemy champion, leaping towards them to deal true damage, increased by 0% : 100% (based on target's Hemorrhage stacks), and granting sight of the area around them for 2.5 seconds from the start of the cast time.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Noxian Guillotine's cooldown after the recast or recast window is calculated by taking the values at the end, and using this formula: (Noxian Guillotine's Cooldown - time since first cast) × 100 ÷ (100 + AH).

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

sources.type: League of Legends Wiki (ability data template)
sources.used_for: manual behavior verification for Decimate execution timing, activation gating, and player-visible resolution semantics

sources.type: League of Legends Wiki (ability data template)
sources.used_for: manual behavior verification for Noxian Guillotine execution timing, activation gating, and player-visible resolution semantics

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
